pages.name: The Brute
pages.text: A boss-site Brute has 250 health, 8 attack damage, 6 armor, and strong knockback resistance. It follows targets from long range and awards 100 experience when defeated.

pages.title: Rock Attack
pages.text: At roughly 6 to 18 blocks, the Brute can begin a 1s rock windup. The attack then enters a 6s cooldown.$(br2)A direct hit deals 6 damage and extra knockback. The impact also creates a 2-block, line-of-sight splash that deals 4 damage.

pages.title: Counterplay
pages.text: Do not bunch up. Break line of sight during the windup, keep solid cover between the impact point and the group, and avoid fighting with a wall or drop behind you.$(br2)Use the warning period to reload and clear a lateral escape route.

pages.title: Guaranteed Reward
pages.text: The Brute always drops one Warp Stone, giving a successful team a reusable travel tool.

pages.title: Encrypted Intel
pages.text: The Brute also drops 1 to 2 pieces of Encrypted Intel. The survivor network will eventually exchange this high-value field information for specialist supplies.
